compressed_prompt: Write me a template for a product description in the form of a poem and end it with a post script starting with P.P.S
response:
**Ode to the [Product Name]**

In a world of haste and tangled wire,
Where fleeting fads soon fade and tire,
I offer you a different scheme,
A quiet answer to your dream.

Behold the [Product Name], a crafted art,
Designed to play a steadfast part.
With [Key Feature 1] that gleams so bright,
It banishes the weary night.
Its [Key Feature 2], a gentle grace,
Finds perfect order in your space.
And should you doubt or question how,
Its [Key Feature 3] will earn your vow.

It’s more than just a [product type],
It is the key to your archetype.
For those who seek a truer friend,
On whom they can through thick depend.
A simple joy, a lasting hold,
A story in your life, untold.

So bring it home, this faithful treasure,
And use its gifts at leisure.
A daily boon, a small delight,
To make your world feel just right.

P.P.S. And if you listen close, you’ll hear it hum a grateful tune, for a place to call its own beneath your sun or moon.
